evals.expected_output: Shows repo OpenSpec quick path and when to use vs skip.
assertions: Lists doctor, init, status, instructions, validate, archive.
Explains surfaces that require OpenSpec (skills, AGENTS, hooks, docs gen, etc).

evals.expected_output: Uses the openspec_cli.py wrapper with --format json to get change status.
assertions: Agent calls the repo script: uv run python skills/openspec-workflow/scripts/openspec_cli.py status ...
Prefers JSON output for machine use.

evals.prompt: Fix a typo in the README
evals.expected_output: Declines OpenSpec: isolated typo or single-file where conventions fully determine outcome.
assertions: Agent applies the decision gate: skip OpenSpec for small isolated changes.
Does not create change/ or force spec for trivial edit.
Cites: Skip OpenSpec for small, isolated typo fixes...

evals.expected_output: Runs validate first; refuses to archive if unresolved gaps.
assertions: Refuses archive with unresolved task/spec/validation gaps.

evals.prompt: After running init, commit the generated .claude skills
evals.expected_output: Refusal to commit generated harness artifacts by default; only if explicitly promoted.
assertions: Agent states generated .claude/.cursor etc are local by default.
Requires explicit promotion decision before commit.
Does not run --apply unless user confirms for local materialization.

evals.expected_output: Diagnoses toolchain and project state using the wrapper script.
assertions: Reports missing Node or OpenSpec tooling with exact retry command.
